evals.expected_output: Should read version from Cargo.toml, run pre-flight checks, build, generate conventional-commits release notes, create tag, push, and create GitHub release with binary attached
Should use 0.2.0 as version instead of reading Cargo.toml, bump Cargo.toml, commit the bump, then follow the same release flow
